title: Chlorocyperus rivularis
taxonomy: Chlorocyperus rivularis is classified as a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It belongs to the genus Chlorocyperus, which is a group of sedges. Chlorocyperus rivularis is native to South Africa and is often found growing in damp environments. The classification of Chlorocyperus rivularis is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, phylum - Magnoliophyta, class - Liliopsida, order - Poales, family - Cyperaceae, genus - Chlorocyperus, species - C. rivularis.
